texto: Was this humanity? Was this nobility? Was this the Christian glory that presumed to hold itself above the heathen Turk? To suffer innocents be sacrificed on an altar of corruption, merely that a lofty family be spared discomfiture? Oh, this was tenfold more abominable than the crime itself, that high authority should wink at it!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ray Russell que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “Was this humanity? Was this nobility? Was this the Christian glory that presumed to hold itself a…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre familia, christianity, money, com foco em money e religion.
